title: GreenPower to Establish Advanced EV Manufacturing and Headquarters in New Mexico
content: GreenPower Motor Company announced an agreement with the New Mexico Economic Development Department to establish a 135,000 sq. ft. advanced electric vehicle manufacturing facility in Santa Teresa, which will also serve as its North American base and U.S. headquarters. The project is expected to generate more than 340 jobs and over $200 million in economic impact. Supported by state incentives including LEDA, JTIP, and tax credits, the move strengthens New Mexicoâ€™s clean energy goals and transportation transition initiatives. The companyâ€™s earlier electric school bus pilot contributed to this investment, and GreenPower will offer dealerâ€‘level pricing on its zeroâ€‘emission commercial fleet.
author: Analysts Account
